overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence following a witch character in a blue robe and pointed hat walking through a fantasy landscape at golden hour. The character traverses an ancient ruins trail, passes through a narrow rocky canyon, and emerges into a wide mountain valley with panoramic vistas.

camera turns slightly right to pass the wooden signpost

dense evergreen pine trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a golden hour trail through ancient ruins, following a witch character in a blue robe. A companion character runs ahead along the path toward a distinctive twisted tree emitting dark energy. The camera passes a wooden signpost and stone ruins while walking through grassy terrain with pine forests on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between high stone walls

events.description: entering narrow rocky canyon with high stone walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon passage between rocky walls

entered.detail: tall rough stone walls forming a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon passage with high stone walls enclosing the path. The twisted tree and signpost are left behind as the camera moves deeper into the rocky corridor, with only sparse vegetation visible. The lighting remains golden hour with the sun filtering through the canyon opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with panoramic vista

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into a wide open valley with expansive mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking along the path admiring the expansive mountain valley and distant peaks ahead

entered.detail: layered mountain peaks visible in the distance with atmospheric haze
low lying fog or mist in the valley below the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rocky canyon, the scene opens into a breathtaking wide valley with panoramic views of distant mountain ranges. The path continues along a grassy hillside with the sun casting long golden rays across the misty valley below. The character walks steadily toward the vista as the landscape opens up completely.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a ruined forest trail through a restrictive rocky passage and into a vast, open mountain valley. It begins by following a witch in a blue robe along a golden hour path, passing stone ruins and a wooden signpost as a companion runs toward a twisted tree emitting dark energy. As the trail narrows, the scene shifts into a rocky canyon where high stone walls enclose the path and the forest disappears, leaving only sparse vegetation under filtered sunlight. The camera then emerges from the corridor, causing the landscape to expand abruptly into a breathtaking wide valley with panoramic views of distant mountain ranges. Finally, the character walks along a grassy hillside as long golden rays stretch across a misty valley below, completing the transition from enclosure to an open vista.
